Content: *p78457a0816* do not write in this area    do not write in this area          do not write in this area 8          3  the concentration of a solution of barium hydroxide can be determined using a  standard solution of ethanedioic acid. (1)      (b)  describe the preparation of 100.0 cm3 of a 0.0500 mol dm 3  standard solution of ethanedioic acid, starting with crystals of  ethanedioic acid dihydrate, h2c2o4.2h2o.     your answer should include details of the apparatus used and the mass of   h2c2o4.2h2o required.
